name: Bazaar Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
Salt and pepper to taste.
Place water in a stock pot. Add split peas, pearl barley, and lima beans. Cook until peas are mushy. Add carrots, onion, celery tops, chicken soup base, butter or margarine, dill weed, sugar, pasta, salt, and pepper. Cook slowly until vegetables are done. Stir frequently to prevent scorching on the bottom. May be frozen. More water may be added to soup if too thick.
Cook for 3 to 4 hours.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
